scope: Authored Blender viewport material and split-normal parity on the exact Geometry Nodes mesh. The procedural filament surface does not slice the bin and is not a G-code toolpath.

shadeSmooth.browserRepresentation: indexed GN mesh plus triangle-corner split display normals

capture.temporalFilter: Eevee-style Blackman-Harris jitter and linear RGBA16F accumulation
capture.lightScaleInterpretation: Blender Area energy and Three.js RectAreaLight intensity use renderer-specific units. The recorded scales align mean exposure under the shared normalized rig; they do not claim equal physical power.

interpretation: The exact bin shell, feet, material assignment, POINT col branch, Generated-coordinate layer bands, distorted Wave texture, Backfacing branch, Bump parameters, face smoothing, and sharp-edge normal islands are represented in the browser. The 64-sample resolve removes the severe single-frame line aliasing and aligns mean exposure within 0.0012 while retaining a subpixel-aligned silhouette. Low spatial correlation records the remaining difference in Eevee versus WebGL area-light response and procedural derivative filtering; renderer identity is not claimed.
